programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: A Canadian wanted in Alberta is stopped en route to Ecuador  a parcel of baby food contains surprising ingredients.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: The Inland Enforcement Team track down an alleged German sex offender  a detector dog sniffs out trouble in an unclaimed suitcase from Dubai.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: Some engineering students carry out an unusual experiment  officers find a construction worker's story has no foundations.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: Suspicions about a convicted smuggler uncover a scam  questions are raised when officers stumble upon a suitcase full of meat.

programs.title: Border Security: Canada's Front Line
programs.desc: While a last-minute booking leads a farm worker down a rocky road, the arrival of some toy trucks rightfully arouses suspicion.
